name: Meal-in-One Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 10 oz canned chunk chicken, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onion in a large skillet until transparent.
2. Add the chicken, mushrooms, peas, rice, pimientos (if using), and pepper; stir well.
3. Heat thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly heated.
